summary.one_liner: Role Foundry is a role-training, evaluation, and promotion system for AI apprentices; this branch makes the generation provenance chain explicit and anchors partner integration as load-bearing by including one promoted public run bundle for a staged Base Sepolia ERC-8004 mint draft, while the current evidence proves a Software Engineer apprentice public alpha loop, a local private-holdout honesty boundary, a staged ERC-8004/Base issuance path, and an external Clawith -> OpenClaw -> Claude/vibecosystem roundtrip path without claiming live minting, native parity, or sealed certification.
summary.scope_note: The shipped public curriculum remains frontend/product-heavy even though the role framing is broader software engineering.

generation_provenance.note: Each evaluated generation is framed through receipts, evaluation context, score deltas, and a promotion/public-issuance decision.

erc8004_base_adapter.note: Promoted/public generations can be staged for ERC-8004 issuance through a thin Role Foundry-owned adapter; no live mint is claimed.

base_sepolia_mint_draft.note: One promoted public generation is publicly packaged for a draft ERC-8004 mint on Base Sepolia. Evidence includes receipts and adapter wiring; chain tx has not been confirmed.

external_roundtrip.note: Tracked proof index plus portable export bundle show one external Clawith -> OpenClaw -> Claude/vibecosystem roundtrip path without upgrading the claim to native parity.

allowed: Generation provenance framing: receipts, evaluation context, score deltas, promotion/public-issuance decision
Software Engineer apprentice as the first concrete shipped role
Staged ERC-8004/Base issuance path for promoted/public generations
Load-bearing Base Sepolia mint proof bundle (run-eval-002) as partner-integration evidence
External Clawith -> OpenClaw -> Claude/vibecosystem roundtrip proof indexed by the tracked manifest and portable bundle
not_claimed: Live Base mint on Sepolia or mainnet

remaining_optional_work.label: Live Base Sepolia mint receipt
remaining_optional_work.needed_for: Any claim that a Role Foundry generation was actually minted as an ERC-8004 identity on Base chain

remaining_optional_work.label: Base mainnet mint proof
remaining_optional_work.needed_for: Any claim of Base mainnet ERC-8004 live minting as partner-track completion
